title: Just A Baguette
description: Adds just one item to the game: A Baguette.
body:
![justabaguette-title](https://i.ibb.co/8cGCV6x/justabaguette-title.png)

---

## 📘 About this mod

**Just A Baguette** adds literally one item: A Baguette. Why? Why not!

- **Hunger:** 15 points (7.5 drumsticks)
- **Saturation:** 18 saturation points
- **Crafting:** 3 Wheat or Hay Blocks in a horizontal row.
- **Villagers:** Can be used to make villagers "willing" to breed.
- **Trading:** Farmers will sell them for Emeralds.
- **Loot:** Found in multiple vanilla loot tables.

This mod is intended to be used alongside my other **micro-mods**. I aim to combat bloated, overproduced mods with simplistic, segmented features. Curate your own pack without editing confusing config files!

---

## 📝 Changelog (v3.0.0)
- Ported to 1.21.11.
- Added villager breeding mechanics.
- Recipes changed from diagonal to flat.
- Farmers now sell baguettes.
- Added to multiple loot tables.

---

## ✋ FAQ
**Q: Will you backport to older versions?**  
**A:** No—I keep my attention on the latest versions to ensure peak performance.

**Q: Why this over other baguette mods?**  
**A:** Every other baguette mod I found added golden baguettes or baguette swords. I wanted a vanilla-friendly, underpowered food item that simply acts like eating 3 bread in one go. So I built it.

**Q: This feels unbalanced. Is there a config?**  
**A:** Not currently! I prefer balancing through community feedback rather than config bloat. If you have thoughts, please join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/X6AsDnqex6) and let me know!

---

**Thanks for downloading!** 😅💗
